title: Idempotency key derivation from request bytes with epoch binding

checks.name: sdk_verifier_clippy_blocker_removed
checks.command: rustfmt --edition 2024 sdk/verifier/src/bundle.rs sdk/verifier/src/capsule.rs sdk/verifier/src/lib.rs && git diff --check -- sdk/verifier/src/bundle.rs sdk/verifier/src/capsule.rs sdk/verifier/src/lib.rs
checks.note: Removed verifier SDK -D warnings blockers that prevented the bd-12n3 clippy proof from reaching dependency compilation.

checks.name: cargo_check_all_targets_via_rch
checks.command: RCH_VISIBILITY=verbose rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_franken_node_pane11 cargo check -p frankenengine-node --all-targets
checks.note: Remote cargo check reached dependency compilation and failed in sibling sqlmodel-frankensqlite at /dp/sqlmodel_rust/crates/sqlmodel-frankensqlite/src/connection.rs:79:41 because fsqlite::Connection::open_with_page_size is not available in fsqlite-core 0.1.2.

checks.name: cargo_clippy_all_targets_via_rch

checks.name: focused_idempotency_tests_via_rch
